name: display-names
description: Message with display names in address headers (RFC 5322 section 3.4)
input:
From: "John Doe" <john@example.com>
To: "Jane Smith" <jane@example.com>
Subject: Display Names
Date: Mon, 27 Jan 2026 10:00:00 +0000
Message-ID: <display-123@example.com>

Message with display names.
